title: Technical Lead
description: As Lead Developer at MoII AI, I lead the design, architecture, development, and deployment of mission-critical AI systems, including the inference platform that powers the core intelligence of our products. I oversee DevOps operations, infrastructure management, deployment pipelines, and engineering execution while remaining actively involved in hands-on development.
key_achievements: Led end-to-end development of scalable chat engines, RAG platforms, AI agents, and distributed backend systems|Responsible for system design, cloud architecture, CI/CD implementation, infrastructure automation|Ensure reliable deployments, system availability, operational excellence, and seamless delivery|Built resilient and maintainable systems that scale efficiently with exceptional user experiences

title: Software Engineer
description: As a Software Engineer, I was actively involved in designing, developing, and delivering scalable software solutions using Python. I contributed to the development of new features, enhanced existing systems, and ensured the reliability, performance, and maintainability of production applications. My responsibilities included backend development, system design, cloud infrastructure management, deployment automation, and performance optimization. I worked extensively with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) to deploy, manage, and scale applications, leveraging cloud-native services to build reliable and efficient systems.
key_achievements: Designed and developed scalable software solutions using Python|Enhanced existing systems for reliability, performance, and maintainability|Managed cloud infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform (GCP)|Built backend services, APIs, automation tools, and distributed systems|Maintained deployment pipelines and monitored production environments|Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver production-ready solutions

title: Software Engineer
description: Played a key role in maintaining and enhancing the organization's health analytics engine, the core system responsible for generating intelligent health reports used by millions of users. Led the complete migration of the analytics engine from R to Python, working independently to successfully port over 10,000 medical and analytical business rules.
key_achievements: Successfully migrated 10,000+ medical and analytical business rules from R to Python|Served more than 4 million users with the health analytics platform|Implemented code protection and deployment strategies using Cython|Improved maintainability, performance, scalability while preserving accuracy and reliability
